title: Cisco flags ongoing exploitation of two recently patched Catalyst SD-WAN flaws

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 — Cisco flags ongoing exploitation of two recently patched Cat
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/03/07
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_ip:
        dst_ip:
            - '20.12.5.3'
            - '20.12.6.1'
            - '20.15.4.2'
            - '20.18.2.1'
            - '20.9.8.2'
    condition: selection_ip
level: high
suricata: alert ip any any -> 20.12.5.3 any (msg:"CDB APEX — Cisco_flags_ongoing_exploitati"; sid:2982460; rev:1;)
alert ip any any -> 20.12.6.1 any (msg:"CDB APEX — Cisco_flags_ongoing_exploitati"; sid:7058975; rev:1;)
alert ip any any -> 20.15.4.2 any (msg:"CDB APEX — Cisco_flags_ongoing_exploitati"; sid:7390851; rev:1;)
alert ip any any -> 20.18.2.1 any (msg:"CDB APEX — Cisco_flags_ongoing_exploitati"; sid:5698755; rev:1;)
alert ip any any -> 20.9.8.2 any (msg:"CDB APEX — Cisco_flags_ongoing_exploitati"; sid:7596971; rev:1;)
snort: alert ip any any -> 20.12.5.3 any (msg:"CDB APEX Cisco_flags_ongoing_exploitati"; sid:2793362; rev:1;)
alert ip any any -> 20.12.6.1 any (msg:"CDB APEX Cisco_flags_ongoing_exploitati"; sid:1329420; rev:1;)
alert ip any any -> 20.15.4.2 any (msg:"CDB APEX Cisco_flags_ongoing_exploitati"; sid:7232425; rev:1;)
alert ip any any -> 20.18.2.1 any (msg:"CDB APEX Cisco_flags_ongoing_exploitati"; sid:2832471; rev:1;)
alert ip any any -> 20.9.8.2 any (msg:"CDB APEX Cisco_flags_ongoing_exploitati"; sid:6537440; rev:1;)
